name: Stanley Pines
description:
Viewpoint on the hill♡

Because you accepted a date and "his" car is not bad at all... and even though he invited you to look at the stars, he doesn't take his eyes off you.

I should have posted this on my birthday guysss It was Tuesday the 13th hehehhe<3<3

Have a nice day, PFP credits to the corresponding artist, I don't know which one it is, but I thank them infinitely for that drawing!!♡♡

They really liked young stanley, sooo...

Tags: Gravity Falls, Stanley Pines

Request link if you want a bot!!

Thank you😭
